what_was_done: Closed out Wave 1 (06-01 CSS committed, SUMMARY files for 06-01 and 06-02 created)
Executed Wave 2 in parallel: 06-03 (cart drawer injection) + 06-04 (cart.html full page)
Executed Wave 3: 06-05 (checkout 4-step state machine + Supabase order creation)
Code review: found 2 Critical + 4 Warning issues
Fixed all 6 findings: CR-01 searchProducts null-guard, CR-02 variantId/image sync, WR-01 signout catch, WR-02 getUser() race, WR-03 dynamic import cleanup, WR-04 cart store stub
session_summary.last_commit_message: docs(06): mark code review findings as fixed

pending_human_actions.action: Apply supabase/migrations/005_style_sessions.sql in Supabase Dashboard → SQL Editor
pending_human_actions.why: ai_style_sessions table does not exist in production until this migration is applied; Style Match session persistence will fail with 42P01 error

pending_human_actions.action: Set NVIDIA_API_KEY in Netlify Environment Variables (Site settings → Environment variables)
pending_human_actions.why: Without this secret, style-match Edge Function falls back to mock response — AI call never reaches NVIDIA NIM
pending_human_actions.replaces: GEMINI_API_KEY (no longer used — can be removed)

pending_human_actions.action: Manual browser test: add item to cart from PDP, open drawer, go to cart page, complete checkout as guest and as authenticated user
